subject: After Party Live in ~3hrs
body:
Yesterday was wild. We broke a world record.

But I got a zillion messages from people who couldn't make it.

So... to make it up to you all - we're running it back & going LIVE AGAIN with the after party, in ~3 hours.

Save this link.

Set an alarm. Festivities begin - at 8am PT / 11am ET.

If you prefer to add the launch event to your calendar (automatically in your timezone), here you go.

It's gonna be wild... again.

Alex
